creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi there!

Thanks for the diff. Unfortunately, one of the patches does not apply. 

===>  Patching for netsurf-3.10
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for netsurf-3.10 from /usr/ports/www/netsurf/files
1 out of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to frontends/gtk/gui.c.rej
===>  FAILED Applying FreeBSD patch-frontends_gtk_gui.c
===> Cleanly applied FreeBSD patch(es)  patch-Makefile patch-frontends_gtk_Makefile.defaults
===> FAILED to apply cleanly FreeBSD patch(es)  patch-frontends_gtk_gui.c
*** Error code 1

Would you mind checking it?

Thanks!
